repair_descent_spec.name: defect_repair_decreases_selected_domain_defect
repair_descent_spec.statement: forall w d, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> d in defect_atoms(w) -> repairable_selected_domain_defect(w,d) -> exists w', terminal_unrestricted(w') and normalization_step(w,w') and discharge_equivalent(w',w) and selected_domain_defect(w') < selected_domain_defect(w)

weakest_missing_object.name: UNRESTRICTED_TERMINAL_NORMALIZATION_BASE_SELECTED
weakest_missing_object.statement: forall w, terminal_unrestricted(w) -> selected_domain_defect(w) = 0 -> exists nf : W_T, selected_domain(nf) and terminal_T(nf) and represents_terminal(nf,w) and normalization_relation(w,nf)
weakest_missing_object.role: base case needed for well-founded induction on selected_domain_defect

does_claim: normalization step rule closed conditionally by repair descent spec
